description_long: This hammer features a robust, double-sided head with a broad, rectangular striking surface on each end, giving it the appearance of a sledge or war hammer. The head is thick and solid, with subtle panel detailing on the sides, and is securely mounted atop a long, cylindrical handle. The handle is segmented with a series of rings and grooves, likely designed to enhance grip and control during use. The overall design is symmetrical, with the head and handle aligned along a central axis. The hammer appears to be constructed from a single material, likely metal, and has a uniform, matte finish. There are no visible signs of branding, wear, or additional attachments.
description: A heavy, double-sided hammer with a broad, rectangular head and a long, grooved handle, all in a uniform matte finish. The design is symmetrical and robust, with detailed paneling on the head.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full width of the double-sided head, with both striking faces and the central handle visible.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the thickness of the hammer head and the length of the handle, with one striking face visible.
description_view_2: Rear view, identical to the front, displaying both striking faces and the handle's central alignment.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, mirroring view 1, showing the head's thickness and the handle's length.
attribute_handle_type: Straight, cylindrical handle with segmented rings and grooves, likely made of steel, designed for enhanced grip.
attribute_head_type: Double-sided, rectangular sledge-type head with broad striking faces and panel detailing on the sides.
